raw_source.title: [HK/Remote] SynFutures Company is looking for Blockchain Web3 Researcher
raw_source.body:
## About
A rapidly growing decentralized derivatives protocol (DeFi) with over $70b cumulative trading volume.
Distributed team of crypto natives, ex-Wall Street veterans, and blockchain technology experts.
Backed by top-tier tech investors, including Pantera Capital, Polychain, SIG, Framework, Dragonfly, Standard Crypto, and Hashkey Capital.
## Responsibilities
1.  Conduct  in-depth  research:  Perform  comprehensive  research  on 
blockchain technologies, especially in DeFi area and public chain.   
2.  Identify use cases: Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to 
identify  potential  use  cases  and  applications  of  blockchain  technology 
across various sectors such as finance, identity management, voting, and 
more. 
3.  Technology evaluation: Evaluate new blockchain platforms, protocols, 
and frameworks to assess their feasibility, scalability, and suitability for our 
organization's  needs.  Provide  recommendations  and  insights  on  the 
adoption of emerging technologies. 
4.  Prototype and development: Design, develop, and prototype innovative 
blockchain solutions that harness the full potential of Web3 technologies. 
Experiment with new concepts, frameworks, and technologies to deliver 
cutting-edge solutions. 
5.  Blockchain forums and conferences participation (Preferred, but Not 
Mandatory): Engage in blockchain forums and conferences, collaborating 
with tech experts around the globe to stay updated on industry trends, share 
insights,  and  leverage  these  interactions  to  inform  and  enhance  our 
research initiatives.
## Requirements
1.  PhD in Computer Science, Math, Software Engineering, Information 
Technology, or a related discipline. A specialization in distributed systems, 
cryptography, or blockchain technology is preferred. Additionally, in-depth 
knowledge in the domain of blockchain is highly desirable.   
2.  Extensive research experience: Proven track record of conducting high-
quality  research,  evidenced  by  publications  in  top-tier  conferences  or 
journals. 
3.  Strong analytical and problem-solving skills: Ability to think critically, 
analyze complex problems, and propose innovative solutions. Comfortable 
with mathematical modeling and algorithms related to distributed systems 
and cryptography.   
4.  Exceptional  communication  skills:  Fluent  in  both  Mandarin  and 
English, with the ability to convey complex technical information clearly 
and concisely.   
 
## Nice to Haves

## Job Nature

- Full-time or not:Yes
- Remote or not: HK/Remote

## Salary and Benefits
HKD 55K+

## Work Location
HK/Remote
## Contact
[hiring@synfutures.com](mailto:hiring@synfutures.com)

narrative: ## About A rapidly growing decentralized derivatives protocol (DeFi) with over $70b cumulative trading volume. Distributed team of crypto natives, ex-Wall Street veterans, and blockchain technology experts. Backed by top-tier tech investors, including Pantera Capital, Polychain, SIG, Framework, Dragonfly, Standard Crypto, and Hashkey Capital. ## Responsibilities 1. Conduct in-depth research: Perform comprehensive research on blockchain technologies, especially in DeFi area and public chain. 2. Identify use cases: Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to identify potential use cases and applications of blockchain technology across various sectors such as finance, identity management, voting, and more. 3. Technology evaluation: Evaluate new blockchain platforms, protocols, and frameworks to assess their feasibility, scalability, and suitability for our organization's needs. Provide recommendations and insights on the adoption of emerging technologies. 4. Prototype and development: Design, develop, and prototype innovative blockchain solutions that harness the full potential of Web3 technologies. Experiment with new concepts, frameworks, and technologies to deliver cutting-edge solutions. 5. Blockchain forums and conferences participation (Preferred, but Not Mandatory): Engage in blockchain forums and conferences, collaborating with tech experts around the globe to stay updated on industry trends, share insights, and leverage these interactions to inform and enhance our research initiatives. ## Requirements 1. PhD in Computer Science, Math, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a related discipline. A specialization in distributed systems, cryptography, or blockchain technology is preferred. Additionally, in-depth knowledge in the domain of blockchain is highly desirable. 2. Extensive research experience: Proven track record of conducting high- quality research, evidenced by publications in top-tier conferences or journals. 3. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills: Ability to think critically, analyze complex problems, and propose innovative solutions. Comfortable with mathematical modeling and algorithms related to distributed systems and cryptography. 4. Exceptional communication skills: Fluent in both Mandarin and English, with the ability to convey complex technical information clearly and concisely.
- Full-time or not:Yes - Remote or not: HK/Remote
